summary: Tab bar translation bug fix verified successfully. The key prop `key={`tabs-${language}`}` on the Tabs component forces a complete re-render when language changes, solving the stuck French tabs issue. All 3 languages (EN/FR/ES) tested and working correctly.

issues: Some menu items still show English text when other languages are selected (e.g., 'Become a Pro', 'My courses' in EN while page is in FR) - minor translation inconsistency

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED FIX: key={`tabs-${language}`} on Tabs component at /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx line 124 - forces re-render when language changes
VERIFIED: No window.location.reload() workaround in languageStore.ts - removed as intended
VERIFIED: Tab labels use t() function for translations (nav.home, nav.market, nav.news, nav.community, nav.learn, nav.ai, nav.profile)
VERIFIED: languageStore correctly persists language to localStorage and AsyncStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tab bar translation fix verified working. The fix uses key={`tabs-${language}`} to force re-render on language change. All 3 languages tested: EN (Home, Market, News, Forum, Learn, AI, Profile), FR (Accueil, Marché, News, Forum, Cours, IA, Profil), ES (Inicio, Mercado, Noticias, Foro, Cursos, IA, Perfil). Language persistence verified - survives page reload.

tab_bar_translation_EN_to_FR.description: Changed language from English to French via Profile page modal - tabs updated to French (Accueil, Marché, Cours, IA, Profil)

language_persistence.description: Set localStorage to French, reloaded page - French persisted, landing page showed 'Bienvenue sur CryptoNai'

spanish_language.description: Set localStorage to Spanish - landing page showed 'Bienvenido a CryptoNai', 'Comenzar', 'Iniciar sesión'

english_tabs_after_login.description: After login with language set to English, tab bar showed: Home, Market, News, Forum, Learn, AI, Profile

login_functionality.description: Login with admin@cryptonai.com / Admin123! worked - navigated to home page

language_selector_modal.description: Language selector on Profile page shows 3 options with flags: Français, English (checked), Español

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Tab bar navigation was stuck in French regardless of selected language
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added key={`tabs-${language}`} on Tabs component to force re-render when language changes
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: BUG FIXED - Tabs now update correctly when language is changed
